urdu transliteration text:
Sadaat-e-karbalaMartyrs of Karbala English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Chelum ko karbala mai jab aii wo bibiyaSadadt-e-karbala
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When the ladies of the Ahlulbayt (a.s.) reached Karbala on the day of Arbaeen,
O Martyrs of Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
kuch bibiya yaha kuch bibiya waha, karti rahi fuga x2bikhri howi thi maqtal-e-sarwar mai ja baja.
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Some ladies are here and some are there, wailing and lamenting,
Each of them were mourning at the body of their loved ones on the plains of Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
akbar ki qabar per yu howi laila noha gardeakha na saal bharaii huu qaid sham say ab ho kay mai riha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
At the grave of Ali Akbar, this is what Bibi Laila said,
O my son I haven’t seen you for a long time,
I have just been released from the prison of Shaam

O my innocent son where shall your mother find you,
Someone please tell me where my Asghar is

urdu transliteration text:
qurban teray ay meray ma jaay bay watanmajboor thi bahainzindan mai muja say teri aamaanat howi juda
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
May I sacrifice myself for you O my Brother,
Your sister was helpless,
In the prison I was lost the daughter you had entrusted to me

urdu transliteration text:
ghut ghut kay ladli teri zinda may mar gaiiturbat wahi banibhaiya wo qaid say na howi mar kay bhi riha
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O’ brother your dear Sakina died in the prison,
Her grave is in the prison,
She was not freed from prison even after her death
